assertions.title: Basketball match cards distinctive design

steps.action: Log in as seeded test user and navigate to /basketball
steps.expected: Basketball page loads with distinctive card design
steps.observed: Basketball page loaded successfully at mobile viewport

steps.action: Inspect first basketball event cards visually and via computed styles
steps.expected: Cards use a distinctive color scheme and are visually differentiated from football cards
steps.observed: Cards displayed basketball content but top-level link boxes had borderRadius 0px, boxShadow none, and background none despite 343px-wide card regions

assertions.issues: Basketball event rows loaded, but the tested card containers lacked visible rounded corners, shadow, and background treatment, so the page did not demonstrate the distinctive polished card design required by the assertion.

assertions.title: Concert cards with visual treatment on imagery

steps.expected: Concert page loads with image-backed concert cards
steps.observed: Concert page loaded successfully at mobile viewport

steps.action: Inspect concert cards visually and via computed styles
steps.expected: Cards show imagery with overlay/color treatment for readable text plus rounded corners and consistent sizing
steps.observed: Cards rendered artist/event text and emoji content, but tested top-level card boxes had borderRadius 0px, boxShadow none, and background none

assertions.issues: The concert listing did not expose image-backed cards with gradient or overlay treatment at the validated container level, so the required polished visual treatment and readability treatment were not confirmed.

assertions.title: Order record page tab design and order cards

steps.expected: Order records page shows highlighted active tab and populated purchase cards when seeded data exists
steps.observed: Purchase tab was active with bg-primary-500 text-white styling, and purchase records displayed

steps.expected: Cards show thumbnail, title, price, status badge, rounded corners, and spacing
steps.observed: Purchase tab showed cards for 'Phoenix Suns VS Los Angeles Lakers' and 'Argentina Home Jersey 2026' with image thumbnail present, price text, status labels, and consistent card spacing in screenshot

steps.expected: Second tab highlights correctly and shows seeded orders when available or a clear empty state otherwise
steps.observed: For Sale tab became active with highlighted styling and showed a clear empty state message 'No orders yet / Your orders will appear here'

evidence.network: GET /api/user/orders?type=purchase -> fetched successfully; For Sale tab rendered empty state with no console-visible request failure

frictions.description: The browser text extraction on Next.js pages included streamed __next_f payload text after visible page content, which added noise during validation.
frictions.resolution: Used screenshots plus targeted DOM/style inspection to isolate visible UI evidence.

summary: Tested 3 assertions: 1 passed (VAL-VIS-009) and 2 failed (VAL-VIS-006, VAL-VIS-007) because basketball and concert list cards did not present the required polished card container styling and image treatment at the validated mobile surface.
